subcodes.first_line: O friends of Abdu'l-Baha and handmaidens of the Blessed Beauty! Jinab-i-Amin hath experienced boundless joy and rapture from the enkindling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء و اماء جمال ابهی جناب امین نهایت وجد و سرور از اشتعال
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
